testcase.name: CLI Tool (Phase 10) > encode + decode roundtrip preserves data
CLI Tool (Phase 10) > verify returns 0 for valid file
CLI Tool (Phase 10) > info displays file metadata
CLI Tool (Phase 10) > returns exit code 1 on invalid file
CLI Tool (Phase 10) > returns exit code 2 for usage errors
Codec FOR_BITPACK > roundtrips integer arrays with negatives and wide ranges
Codec FOR_BITPACK > encodes constant blocks with bitWidth=0 and decodes exactly
Codec FOR_BITPACK > is competitive on favorable narrow-range VALUE integer deltas
Codec FOR_BITPACK > keeps full roundtrip integrity when FOR_BITPACK is used in VALUE stream
Codec FOR_BITPACK > beats plain varint size on narrow residual distributions
Codec FOR_BITPACK > keeps roundtrip correctness on wide-range values where FOR may not be best
Codec FOR_BITPACK > keeps deterministic VALUE codec selection sequence across repeated runs
Codec XOR_FLOAT > roundtrips constant float deltas exactly
Codec XOR_FLOAT > roundtrips linear-trend float deltas exactly
Codec XOR_FLOAT > roundtrips volatile/random deterministic float deltas exactly
Codec XOR_FLOAT > roundtrips float deltas bit-a-bit for finite values
Codec XOR_FLOAT > produces smaller payload than FIXED64 on favorable float deltas
Codec XOR_FLOAT > uses XOR_FLOAT for favorable finite float sequences
Codec XOR_FLOAT > falls back to absolute FIXED64 for non-finite sequences
Codec XOR_FLOAT > keeps deterministic codec selection sequence for float blocks
Codec XOR_FLOAT > FASE 10: CLI e2e se valida en tests/cli.test.ts (no bloquea FASE 3 de codecs)
AuditChain (fase 7) > 10K entries → chain integridad verificada al 100%
AuditChain (fase 7) > tamper 1 entry → verify() detecta corruption
AuditChain (fase 7) > tamper payload → verify() detecta corruption
AuditChain (fase 7) > audit write fails → original put() tambien falla (integración)
AuditChain (fase 7) > merkle checkpoint cada 1000 entries con root hash correcto
AuditChain (fase 7) > export() genera JSON lines valido y parseable
FileLock (Roadmap v1.3.2 - Fase 1.5) > permite múltiples locks compartidos simultáneos
FileLock (Roadmap v1.3.2 - Fase 1.5) > bloquea lock exclusivo cuando existe lock compartido y respeta timeout
FileLock (Roadmap v1.3.2 - Fase 1.5) > bloquea lock compartido cuando existe lock exclusivo y respeta timeout
FileLock (Roadmap v1.3.2 - Fase 1.5) > permite lock exclusivo una vez liberados locks compartidos
FileLock (Roadmap v1.3.2 - Fase 1.5) > helpers withSharedLock/withExclusiveLock aplican semántica correcta
Insight Engine Wiring (Phase 9) > degradation simulated → recommendation emitted in <5s
Insight Engine Wiring (Phase 9) > accuracy tracking: follow successful rec → accuracy increases
Insight Engine Wiring (Phase 9) > accuracy < 50% after 20 outcomes → type disabled
Insight Engine Wiring (Phase 9) > onWrite fails → put() operation succeeds (best-effort)
Insight Engine Wiring (Phase 9) > TTL 24h → expired recommendation not returned
MemTable (Roadmap v1.3.2 - Fase 1.1) > inserta y recupera registros con created/updated/accessCount
MemTable (Roadmap v1.3.2 - Fase 1.1) > reemplaza fields en updates, incrementa updated y no duplica dirtyCount
MemTable (Roadmap v1.3.2 - Fase 1.1) > scan(prefix) filtra por prefijo
MemTable (Roadmap v1.3.2 - Fase 1.1) > delete elimina registro y ajusta count/dirty/size
MemTable (Roadmap v1.3.2 - Fase 1.1) > resetDirty limpia dirty flags y dirtyCount
MemTable (Roadmap v1.3.2 - Fase 1.1) > expone thresholds por defecto del roadmap
MemTable (Roadmap v1.3.2 - Fase 1.1) > shouldFlush por dirtyCount cuando supera maxDirtyRecords
MemTable (Roadmap v1.3.2 - Fase 1.1) > shouldFlush por size cuando supera maxMemTableBytes
PromptDistiller > should store and retrieve records from RAW tier
PromptDistiller > should compress RAW → COMPRESSED after retention period
PromptDistiller > should distill COMPRESSED → DISTILLED after 30+ days
PromptDistiller > should preserve metadata across all tier transitions
PromptDistiller > should show significant disk usage reduction after 30 days
PromptDistiller > should handle compression failure gracefully - data stays in previous tier
PromptDistiller > should run emergency purge when triggered manually
PromptDistiller > should correctly classify existing data on first initialization
GICSDaemon real-world soak / fault-line test > survive mixed continuous load + maintenance + restart (binary)
testcase.system-out:
[GICS] Generated new security token at C:\Users\shilo\AppData\Local\Temp\gics-daemon-soak-gUQd2w\.gics_token [GICS] Replaying WAL...

testcase.name: ResilienceShell (fase 6) > 5 failures en 60s → circuit OPEN → calls fail-fast
ResilienceShell (fase 6) > 30s cooldown → HALF-OPEN → 3 probes OK → CLOSED
ResilienceShell (fase 6) > retry con jitter: delays no son idénticos en múltiples retries
ResilienceShell (fase 6) > backpressure: >highWaterMark pending → caller recibe error con queueDepth
ResilienceShell (fase 6) > error metadata siempre presente: {attempts, circuitState, queueDepth}
ResilienceShell (fase 6) > circuitState transitions: CLOSED → OPEN → HALF_OPEN → CLOSED
GICSSupervisor (fase 5) > subsystem falla → restart automático en <2s
testcase.system-out:
[Supervisor] STARTING -> HEALTHY: supervisor started (2026-03-16T01:40:38.585Z)
[Supervisor] HEALTHY -> RESTARTING: subsystem failure (memOk=false, walOk=false) (2026-03-16T01:40:38.688Z)
[Supervisor] RESTARTING -> HEALTHY: restart succeeded after 50ms backoff (2026-03-16T01:40:38.749Z)

testcase.name: GICSSupervisor (fase 5) > 5 failures en 5min → DEGRADED mode activado
testcase.system-out:
[Supervisor] STARTING -> HEALTHY: supervisor started (2026-03-16T01:40:40.095Z)
[Supervisor] HEALTHY -> RESTARTING: subsystem failure (memOk=false, walOk=false) (2026-03-16T01:40:40.151Z)
testcase.system-err: [Supervisor] RESTARTING -> DEGRADED: 5 restarts in 300s window (2026-03-16T01:40:40.459Z)

testcase.name: GICSSupervisor (fase 5) > en DEGRADED: writes se bufferizan, reads del snapshot
testcase.system-out: [Supervisor] STARTING -> HEALTHY: supervisor started (2026-03-16T01:40:41.603Z)

testcase.name: GICSSupervisor (fase 5) > post-recovery: buffer se flushea, conflictos resueltos (WAL wins)
testcase.system-out: [Supervisor] STARTING -> HEALTHY: supervisor started (2026-03-16T01:40:41.711Z) [Supervisor] Conflict: WAL wins for key="k2", buffer write discarded.

testcase.name: GICSSupervisor (fase 5) > resetDegraded() → vuelve a STARTING → HEALTHY
testcase.system-out:
[Supervisor] STARTING -> HEALTHY: supervisor started (2026-03-16T01:40:41.715Z)
[Supervisor] HEALTHY -> RESTARTING: subsystem failure (memOk=false, walOk=false) (2026-03-16T01:40:41.770Z)
[Supervisor] DEGRADED -> STARTING: manual reset from DEGRADED (2026-03-16T01:40:42.529Z)
[Supervisor] STARTING -> HEALTHY: subsystem restarted after manual reset (2026-03-16T01:40:42.529Z)
testcase.system-err: [Supervisor] RESTARTING -> DEGRADED: 3 restarts in 300s window (2026-03-16T01:40:41.896Z)

testcase.name: GICSSupervisor (fase 5) > state transitions logueados con timestamp
testcase.system-out: [Supervisor] STARTING -> HEALTHY: supervisor started (2026-03-16T01:40:42.529Z)

testcase.name: WAL v2 (fase 4) > lector v2 migra y replays WAL v1 binario
WAL v2 (fase 4) > corrupción CRC en recovery: salta entry corrupta y continúa

[WAL] CRC mismatch at offset 5. Skipping corrupted entry.

[WAL] Invalid checkpoint hash detected. Falling back to previous checkpoint.

testcase.name: WAL providers (binary/jsonl) > fsync strict se comporta como fail-closed en errores de sync (binary)
WAL providers (binary/jsonl) > fsync strict se comporta como fail-closed en errores de sync (jsonl)
Advorsarial Suite (Fase 8) > 1. Fuzz Roundtrip (50 iterations) > should roundtrip 50 randomized datasets without error
Advorsarial Suite (Fase 8) > 2. Systematic Truncation > should throw IncompleteDataError for every truncated length
Advorsarial Suite (Fase 8) > 3. Systematic Bit-Flipping > should detect bit flips in header and payload
Advorsarial Suite (Fase 8) > 4. Decompression Bomb Protection > should reject StreamSection claiming huge uncompressed size
Advorsarial Suite (Fase 8) > 5. Concurrency > should handle 10 parallel encoder/decoder instances without pollution
HealthMonitor (CHM) > starts in NORMAL state
HealthMonitor (CHM) > routes to CORE in normal conditions
HealthMonitor (CHM) > triggers ENTROPY_GATE when entropy is too high
HealthMonitor (CHM) > detects RATIO_DROP anomaly and switches to QUARANTINE
HealthMonitor (CHM) > detects ENTROPY_BURST
HealthMonitor (CHM) > recovers from QUARANTINE after M_RECOVERY_BLOCKS successes
GICS float edge-cases > roundtrips special IEEE-754 values (NaN, ±Infinity, -0)
GICS float edge-cases > roundtrips extreme finite floats (MAX_VALUE, MIN_VALUE/subnormal)
Generic Encoder/Decoder Round-Trip > Trust schema (string keys + categorical) > round-trips trust snapshots with identical data
Generic Encoder/Decoder Round-Trip > Trust schema (string keys + categorical) > categorical fields round-trip as strings, not numbers
Generic Encoder/Decoder Round-Trip > Trust schema (string keys + categorical) > string keys are preserved exactly
Generic Encoder/Decoder Round-Trip > Numeric schema (no categorical) > round-trips sensor data
Generic Encoder/Decoder Round-Trip > Minimal schema > single-field schema round-trips
Generic Encoder/Decoder Round-Trip > queryGeneric() > query by string key returns matching snapshots
Generic Encoder/Decoder Round-Trip > queryGeneric() > query by numeric key on numeric schema
Generic Encoder/Decoder Round-Trip > queryGeneric() > query by non-existent key returns empty
Generic Encoder/Decoder Round-Trip > Legacy compatibility via getAllGenericSnapshots() > legacy files return { price, quantity } records
Generic Encoder/Decoder Round-Trip > Integrity > verify() passes on schema-encoded files
Generic Encoder/Decoder Round-Trip > Integrity > getAllSnapshots() on legacy files still works
Generic Encoder/Decoder Round-Trip > Large dataset > 1000 trust snapshots round-trip correctly
GICS v1.3 Golden Corpus > legacy_plain: sha256 matches, verify ok, unpack matches expected
GICS v1.3 Golden Corpus > legacy_multisegment: verify ok, unpack matches expected
GICS v1.3 Golden Corpus > legacy_encrypted: verify ok, unpack requires password and matches expected
GICS v1.3 Golden Corpus > schema_trust_events_plain: verify ok, schema is readable and generic query works
GICS v1.3 Golden Corpus > tamper: 1-bit flip must fail (IntegrityError)
GICS v1.3 Golden Corpus > truncation: missing EOS must fail (IncompleteDataError)
GICS v1.3 Golden Corpus > wrong password: encrypted file rejects
Item-Major Layout > roundtrip: stable multi-item (20 items x 100 snapshots)
Item-Major Layout > segment flag is set for stable multi-item data
Item-Major Layout > fallback: varying item counts stay snapshot-major
Item-Major Layout > single-item data does not activate item-major
Item-Major Layout > roundtrip: large multi-item (20 items x 500 snapshots)
GICS system limits > handles a high snapshot count without integrity loss
GICS system limits > handles snapshots with thousands of items
GICS system limits > supports configurable heavy stress for snapshot and item counts
GICS system limits > rejects malicious section length tampering (limit or integrity path)
GICS Multi-Item Roundtrip > should roundtrip multi-item snapshots exactly
GICS Multi-Item Roundtrip > should preserve item IDs correctly
GICS Multi-Item Roundtrip > should preserve quantities correctly
GICS Multi-Item Roundtrip > should roundtrip floating point price/quantity without precision loss in legacy mode
GICS Multi-Item Roundtrip > should handle variable item counts per snapshot
GICS Multi-Item Roundtrip > should handle empty items (snapshot with 0 items)
GICS Multi-Item Roundtrip > should produce deterministic output (sorted by itemId)
GICS Multi-Item Roundtrip > should reject data without EOS marker
CompressionProfiler > profiles trend data (quick mode)
CompressionProfiler > profiles volatile data (quick mode)
CompressionProfiler > profiles multi-item data (quick mode)
CompressionProfiler > best trial has highest ratio among all trials
CompressionProfiler > rejects empty sample
CompressionProfiler > preset matching works when config aligns
GICS Phase 11: Quarantine Cap (FIXED64_LE) > should trigger quarantine and use FIXED64_LE for noisy data
GICS Phase 11: Quarantine Cap (FIXED64_LE) > reconstructs values correctly when using FIXED64_LE
Schema Profiles — Retrocompatibility > Type definitions > FieldDef has correct shape
Schema Profiles — Retrocompatibility > Type definitions > FieldDef supports categorical with enumMap
Schema Profiles — Retrocompatibility > Type definitions > SchemaProfile has correct shape
Schema Profiles — Retrocompatibility > Type definitions > GenericSnapshot supports custom item types
Schema Profiles — Retrocompatibility > Type definitions > GenericSnapshot default type matches legacy Snapshot
Schema Profiles — Retrocompatibility > Format constants > HAS_SCHEMA flag is defined and does not conflict
Schema Profiles — Retrocompatibility > Format constants > SCHEMA_STREAM_BASE is 100
Schema Profiles — Retrocompatibility > Format constants > VERSION_BYTE remains 0x03
Schema Profiles — Retrocompatibility > Predefined schemas > MARKET_DATA schema exists and has price+quantity
Schema Profiles — Retrocompatibility > Predefined schemas > TRUST_EVENTS schema exists with 6 fields
Schema Profiles — Retrocompatibility > Byte-identical encoding without schema > pack() without schema produces identical bytes across two calls
Schema Profiles — Retrocompatibility > Byte-identical encoding without schema > header version byte is 0x03 when no schema
Schema Profiles — Retrocompatibility > Byte-identical encoding without schema > header flags do NOT include HAS_SCHEMA when no schema given
Schema Profiles — Retrocompatibility > Round-trip without schema (legacy path) > encode → decode produces identical data
Schema Profiles — Retrocompatibility > Round-trip without schema (legacy path) > verify() passes on files without schema
Schema Profiles — Retrocompatibility > Round-trip without schema (legacy path) > query() works on files without schema
Schema Section in Header > Schema encoding/decoding round-trip > encoder with schema → decoder reads same schema via parseHeader()
Schema Section in Header > Schema encoding/decoding round-trip > schema with categorical field preserves enum map
Schema Section in Header > Schema encoding/decoding round-trip > all field properties survive round-trip
Schema Section in Header > Legacy files (no schema) > decoder returns legacy schema for v1.3 files without HAS_SCHEMA
Schema Section in Header > Header flags > HAS_SCHEMA flag is set when schema provided
Schema Section in Header > Header flags > HAS_SCHEMA flag is NOT set without schema
Schema Section in Header > Integrity > verify() passes on files with schema
GICS cryptographic security checks > PBKDF2 key derivation is deterministic for same password/salt/iterations
GICS cryptographic security checks > auth verification succeeds for correct key and fails for wrong key
GICS cryptographic security checks > auth verification has bounded timing delta between match/mismatch paths
GICS cryptographic security checks > stream IV domain separation produces different ciphertext/tag across stream IDs
GICS cryptographic security checks > tampered ciphertext/tag is rejected by decryptSection
GICS cryptographic security checks > encrypted pack/unpack succeeds with correct password and fails with wrong password
StringDictionary > build() > builds from unique keys, sorted
StringDictionary > build() > deduplicates keys
StringDictionary > build() > handles empty input
StringDictionary > encode/decode round-trip > round-trips simple keys
StringDictionary > encode/decode round-trip > round-trips keys with common prefixes
StringDictionary > encode/decode round-trip > round-trips with decodeForward
StringDictionary > encode/decode round-trip > round-trips empty dictionary
StringDictionary > encode/decode round-trip > round-trips single entry
StringDictionary > encode/decode round-trip > round-trips unicode strings
StringDictionary > encode/decode round-trip > should throw when decoding truncated data
StringDictionary > compression efficiency > common prefix keys compress smaller than naive
StringDictionary > large dictionary > handles 1000 entries
SegmentIndex with StringDictionary > round-trips SegmentIndex WITHOUT string dict (backward compat)
SegmentIndex with StringDictionary > round-trips SegmentIndex WITH string dict
SegmentIndex with StringDictionary > containsString() works via string dict lookup
SegmentIndex with StringDictionary > containsString() returns false when no string dict
GICS v1.3 Forensics & Verification > should verify file integrity without decompression
GICS v1.3 Forensics & Verification > should fail verification if CRC is tampered
GICS v1.3 Forensics & Verification > verifyIntegrityOnly should return false for corrupt data (no throw)
GICS v1.3 Forensics & Verification > should fail if cross-stream lengths mismatch (Manual Trigger)
GICS v1.3 Forensics & Verification > should detect sum(snapshotLen) != itemIds.length
GICS v1.3 Format > Version Byte > should encode with version byte 0x03
GICS v1.3 Format > Version Byte > should decode v1.3 format successfully
GICS v1.3 Format > Hash Chain Integrity > should detect payload tampering
GICS v1.3 Format > Hash Chain Integrity > should detect hash field tampering
GICS v1.3 Format > Hash Chain Integrity > should verify multiple stream sections
GICS v1.3 Format > Roundtrip Integrity > should roundtrip single snapshot correctly
GICS v1.3 Format > Roundtrip Integrity > should roundtrip multi-item snapshots
GICS v1.3 Format > Roundtrip Integrity > should roundtrip large dataset with trends
GICS v1.3 Format > Backward Compatibility > should accept v1.2 format (version 0x02)
GICS v1.3 Format > Backward Compatibility > should reject unsupported version with clear error
GICS v1.3 Format > Stream Section Format > should encode all mandatory streams
GICS v1.3 Format > Stream Section Format > should use outer compression (Zstd)
GICS v1.3 Segments & Append > should encode and decode multiple segments using size limit
GICS v1.3 Segments & Append > should append to an existing GICS file
GICS v1.3 Segments & Append > should perform optimized query using segment index
GICS v1.3 Segments & Append > should verify file-level integrity chain
GICS v1.3 Segments & Append > should throw IntegrityError on decodeNextSegment with corrupt data
InsightTracker (Phase 3.1) > tracks entropy, volatility, streak, and streakRecord
InsightTracker (Phase 3.1) > computes per-field trends with ema, direction, zScore
InsightTracker (Phase 3.1) > resets streak on direction change
InsightTracker (Phase 3.1) > computes Shannon entropy approaching 1.0 for equal up/down
InsightTracker (Phase 3.1) > lifecycle classification works with new fields present
CorrelationAnalyzer (Phase 3.2) > detects positive correlation between co-moving items
CorrelationAnalyzer (Phase 3.2) > forms clusters from correlated items
CorrelationAnalyzer (Phase 3.2) > getLeadingIndicators returns indicators with lag
CorrelationAnalyzer (Phase 3.2) > getSeasonalPatterns returns array
PredictiveSignals (Phase 3.3) > detects anomaly when z-score exceeds threshold
PredictiveSignals (Phase 3.3) > generates lifecycle-based recommendations
PredictiveSignals (Phase 3.3) > getForecast returns projection with decaying confidence
PredictiveSignals (Phase 3.3) > getAnomalies filters by since timestamp
Daemon Insight IPC (Phase 3 integration) > getCorrelations, getClusters, getLeadingIndicators, getSeasonalPatterns via IPC

testcase.name: Deep Dive Phase 4: Structural and CHM Validation > verifies SNAPSHOT_LEN trial selection chooses the most efficient codec
Deep Dive Phase 4: Structural and CHM Validation > verifies ITEM_ID uses DICT_VARINT when item IDs repeat
Deep Dive Phase 4: Structural and CHM Validation > verifies context isolation: one stream must NOT affect another in trial
Deep Dive Phase 4: Structural and CHM Validation > verifies CHM transition for TIME stream under high jitter
smoke-globals > vitest runs (globals)
testcase.system-out: [smoke-globals] test executed

testcase.name: smoke > vitest runs
testcase.system-out: [smoke] test executed

testcase.name: Regression: codec selection stability > produces deterministic telemetry codec sequence for same input
Regression: EOS Missing > should throw IncompleteDataError if EOS marker is missing
Regression: EOS Trailing Bytes > should throw if bytes exist after EOS
Regression: float precision stability > keeps IEEE-754 semantics for challenging floating values
Regression: Integrity Mismatch > should roundtrip bit-exact with seed 12345
Regression: quarantine trigger stability > keeps triggering quarantine on noisy bursts and remains decodable
Regression: Truncation Silent Success > should throw IncompleteDataError for truncated streams
